description_long: This bench features a modern design with a sturdy metal frame and wooden slats forming the seat and backrest. The frame is composed of two thick, curved metal supports that serve as both legs and armrests, providing stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The seat consists of three wide, flat wooden planks, while the backrest is made up of two horizontal wooden slats, slightly angled for ergonomic comfort. The wood has a natural, medium-brown finish, contrasting with the matte gray metal frame. The bench is designed to comfortably seat one to two people and is suitable for public spaces such as parks, sidewalks, or plazas. Its robust construction suggests durability and resistance to outdoor elements.
description: A modern bench with a curved gray metal frame and horizontal wooden slats for the seat and backrest. Designed for durability and comfort in public outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the wooden seat and backrest, with both armrests and the sturdy metal frame clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the angled backrest and the continuous curve of the metal frame supporting the bench.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the two horizontal wooden slats of the backrest and the full width of the metal supports.
description_view_3: Front-side view emphasizing the seat's wooden planks and the open space beneath the bench, as well as the armrest design.
attribute_leg_design: curved metal supports forming legs and armrests
